globalAvoid.label: white card grid plus blue CTA template
globalAvoid.reason: It reads as average AI-generated web design instead of a deliberate product or company surface.

globalAvoid.label: rounded card stacks with thin soft shadows
globalAvoid.reason: It creates template feel and weakens material seriousness.

globalAvoid.label: heavy full dark console palette
globalAvoid.reason: The user repeatedly rejects heavy developer-only feeling for ordinary web surfaces.

globalAvoid.label: solving design quality with gradients alone
globalAvoid.reason: Color polish without hierarchy, density, and realness does not satisfy adoption quality.

mieNdiAvoid.label: restaurant-like luxury or unrelated benchmark residue
mieNdiAvoid.reason: MieNDI is an industrial inspection company; the tone must be safety, precision, and field trust.

mieNdiAvoid.label: abstract safety copy without concrete inspection proof
mieNdiAvoid.reason: The site needs visible inspection method, field coverage, and reporting credibility.

mieNdiAvoid.label: real photo present but composition, hierarchy, and customer-image fit are weak
mieNdiAvoid.reason: The failed DQO v1 recommendation proved that asset presence is not design quality.

mieNdiAvoid.label: auto recommendation before beating the customer-image benchmark
mieNdiAvoid.reason: Suruga Inspection is now the customer-image reference; a MieNDI design must beat that reference on clarity and maturity before PASS.
